name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the accessory as shown in HomeKit.

ip.title: IP Address or Hostname
ip.description: IP address or hostname of your OpenGarage device.

key.title: Device Key
key.description: Device key (password) configured on your OpenGarage.

openCloseDurationSecs.title: Open/Close Duration (seconds)
openCloseDurationSecs.description: Time within which the door should reliably finish opening or closing, including any warning beeps.

pollFrequencySecs.title: Poll Frequency (seconds)
pollFrequencySecs.description: How often to poll OpenGarage for state changes.

vehicleSensorName.title: Vehicle Sensor Name
vehicleSensorName.description: Name of the occupancy sensor exposed for vehicle presence.

requestTimeoutMs.title: HTTP Request Timeout (ms)
requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for HTTP requests to the OpenGarage device.
